_comment: Per-file line-count budgets enforced by scripts/check-file-sizes.ts. New `.ts`/`.tsx` files default to `threshold` lines. Files listed in `budgets` are grandfathered at their commit-time line count and may not grow past their entry — the ratchet only goes DOWN. Loosening (raising `threshold` or a budget entry) requires an explicit commit by a human; the script never auto-edits this file.
